(**NABO**) is one of several regulators of [boxing](/wiki/Boxing "Boxing") that works in [North America](/wiki/North_America "North America").[[1]](#cite_note-1) The NABO is one of the regional bodies that is part of the [World Boxing Organization](/wiki/World_Boxing_Organization "World Boxing Organization").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Regional body of the World Boxing Organization

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Question_book-new.svg) | This article **needs additional citations for [verification](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Please help [improve this article](/wiki/Special:EditPage/North_American_Boxing_Organization "Special:EditPage/North American Boxing Organization") by [adding citations to reliable sources](/wiki/Help:Referencing_for_beginners "Help:Referencing for beginners"). Unsourced material may be challenged and removed. *Find sources:* ["North American Boxing Organization"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22North+American+Boxing+Organization%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22North+American+Boxing+Organization%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22North+American+Boxing+Organization%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22North+American+Boxing+Organization%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22North+American+Boxing+Organization%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22North+American+Boxing+Organization%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(October 2015)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

The **North American Boxing Organization** (**NABO**) is one of several regulators of [boxing](/wiki/Boxing "Boxing") that works in [North America](/wiki/North_America "North America").[[1]](#cite_note-1) The NABO is one of the regional bodies that is part of the [World Boxing Organization](/wiki/World_Boxing_Organization "World Boxing Organization").

## Current champions

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| [Junior flyweight](/wiki/Junior_flyweight "Junior flyweight") | [Puerto Rico](/wiki/Puerto_Rico "Puerto Rico") [Jonathan González](/wiki/Jonathan_Gonz%C3%A1lez_(flyweight) "Jonathan González (flyweight)") | 21 February 2020 | 2226 | 28–4–1 |

| [Super lightweight](/wiki/Super_lightweight "Super lightweight") | [Puerto Rico](/wiki/Puerto_Rico "Puerto Rico") Alfredo Santiago | 15 June 2024 | 650 | 16–2 |
| [Welterweight](/wiki/Welterweight "Welterweight") | [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") Alexis Rocha | 19 July 2024 | 616 | 25–2–1 |
| [Super welterweight](/wiki/Super_welterweight "Super welterweight") | [Puerto Rico](/wiki/Puerto_Rico "Puerto Rico") [Xander Zayas](/wiki/Xander_Zayas "Xander Zayas") | 13 August 2022 | 1322 | 21–0 |
| [Middleweight](/wiki/Middleweight "Middleweight") | [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Troy Isley](/wiki/Troy_Isley "Troy Isley") | 21 June 2024 | 644 | 14–0 |
| [Super middleweight](/wiki/Super_middleweight "Super middleweight") | [Puerto Rico](/wiki/Puerto_Rico "Puerto Rico") [Edgar Berlanga](/wiki/Edgar_Berlanga "Edgar Berlanga") | 9 October 2021 | 1630 | 23–2 |
| [Light heavyweight](/wiki/Light_heavyweight "Light heavyweight") | [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") [Joe Smith Jr.](/wiki/Joe_Smith_Jr. "Joe Smith Jr.") | 11 January 2020 | 2267 | 25–3 |
| [Cruiserweight](/wiki/Cruiserweight_(boxing) "Cruiserweight (boxing)") | [Canada](/wiki/Canada "Canada") [Jean Pascal](/wiki/Jean_Pascal "Jean Pascal") | 21 September 2024 | 552 | 37–7–1 |
| [Heavyweight](/wiki/Heavyweight "Heavyweight") | [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany") [Agit Kabayel](/wiki/Agit_Kabayel "Agit Kabayel") | 18 May 2024 | 678 | 25–0 |
